title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Westside

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Westside
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Westside! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Westside:
Westside is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Westside!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
